milestone1_title: Published The Seasons That Made Me
milestone1_description: A collection of essays and poetry chronicling the formative experiences of growing up in rural Southeast Idaho.
milestone2_title: League of Utah Writers: Olive Woolley Burt Awards
milestone2_description:
First Place, [First Chapter Adult](https://www.leagueofutahwriters.com/woolley-winners-2025) - *Turbulent Waters*  
Third Place, [New Voices: Creative Nonfiction](https://www.leagueofutahwriters.com/woolley-winners-2025) - *Twists of Fate*
